text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before tryouts, and I'm taking an afternoon stroll in a
nearby park, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoooa! Move! Move!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing I was unable to react to her in time, Tokai Teio leaps clean
over my head. Moments later...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whew!
...Here, your hat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, this little girl's hat had gotten stuck in a tree, and Teio's
fetched it for her.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Thanks so much, miss! That jump was super high! You looked
so cool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Tsk tsk, don't you know my name? I'm the incredible, the invincible
Teio! ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: In...vincible? I don't know what that means, but it sounds cool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! You may shower me with all the praise you want!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, almost forgot. You there! Sorry for the scare.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No brakes on these legs—ended up flying right over you! Oh, you're
not hurt or anything, are you?
choice_data_list: I should be asking you, that's quite some air you got. Are your legs fine from the landing?
I should be asking you, that's quite some air you got. Are your legs fine from the landing?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hah! It'll take more than that to hurt me! See? Not a scratch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That was no short fall, but she really does seem to be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's tough, and agile too, if that jump is anything to go by—a natural
athlete's physique.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Did I scare you? I totally did, didn't I? Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, shoot! Almost forgot I was in the middle of a run. See ya later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Tokai Teio runs off, her steps light as a
breeze—another testament to her talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch from the sidelines at tryouts the following day, she's still at
the top of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
That's it, Teio!
Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And coming up from behind is Tokai Teio, gunning for the lead with a
spring in her step!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. First place is mine!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio pulling farther and farther ahead! She's not slowing down,
she's leaving everyone else in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And across the line with four lengths over second place! Today's
tryout triumph goes to Tokai Teio! What an overwhelming display of
strength!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! Heeey! What'd you all think of my race?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: You were the best, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You were so cool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh, thank youuu! But, just another day for me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You... Ah! You were the one at the park yesterday! Wait, but
what are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! You're a trainer! You've even got the badge and
everything!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So if you're talking to me... does that mean you're here to scout me?
choice_data_list: I'd love to be your trainer!
I'd love to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Ohhh, I don't know... See, I've been approached by a lot of trainers, even before tryouts.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Ah! There you are, Tokai Teio! Your performance was simply incredible! You have to let me scout you!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Teio, let's work together! With me, you won't just be a G1 champion,
you'll be a Triple Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, and now there's more! Nnngh, so many trainers want me,
it's impossible to choose!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But, well, since I'll be the one doing the actual running, maybe it
doesn't even matter who my trainer is.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, whoever beats me in rock paper scissors gets to scout me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Come now, Teio—the bond between trainer and runner should not be
taken so lightly.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahh, it's Prez! Prez is here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You came to watch my tryouts! Well? Well? What did you think?! I
came first again!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, I saw with my own two eyes. You ran an excellent race, as
always.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! Hehe. A compliment from Prez! ♪ Hey hey, did you all hear
that?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-yes, but never mind that now—I'm here to talk about scouting.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: "Never mind"?! What do you mean, "never mind"? Do you have any idea how great Prez is?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: She's not just the student council president, she's the fastest and strongest and coolest racer ever, and she's also my biggest role model!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm gonna be just like her, then she'll be giving me
compliments all day long!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, if you're serious about scouting me, then first you'd better learn
all about how great she is!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Starting with, let's see... Have you seen her debut race? No way you
haven't, right? Oh my gosh, the way she rounded that first corner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio proceeds to regale the hopeful trainers with tales of her beloved
student council president's heroics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Needless to say, there was no time to talk about scouting.
